local_sources: Byte-verified final-ready file-preparation packages or explicitly registered standalone evidence for identity, ownership, engagement, privacy, AI applicability, AML and monitoring
local_processing: Validate every sealed upstream output byte and promote only reviewed unambiguous fields
Verify the phase-one bounded source snapshot exactly against its sealed inventory before promotion
Validate explicit processing authority and pseudonymous professional attribution
Validate source-bound records, chronology and evidence freshness
Derive a hash-bound inclusive temporal horizon from evidence, identity, authoritative-source and template deadlines, and revalidate it against the system UTC date at Apply

Remove known local-path fields, known absolute path occurrences, and private QA text from the browser payload served through the loopback workbench, and require a per-session token for write operations

codex_context.purpose: Assess missing evidence and prepare decisions reserved to the commercialista
codex_context.content: Validated case records, ownership and mandate facts, privacy and AML evidence, provenance anchors, unresolved decisions and private run metadata needed to resolve local artifacts
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Proceed only under the recorded processing authority, keep absolute local paths out of the pseudonymous review payload and widget, use validated structured records and targeted evidence anchors, and avoid reopening complete source folders unless a material ambiguity requires it

codex_context.purpose: Prepare the professional-review dossier and monitoring plan
codex_context.content: Case-specific decision records, gaps, calculations and selected evidence excerpts
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Include only facts and excerpts supporting the proposed review item

residual_risks.risk: The professional setup necessarily includes identity, ownership, mandate, privacy and AML facts about identifiable people
residual_risks.mitigation: Use owner-only outputs, validated structured records, targeted evidence and explicit professional review gates

residual_risks.risk: A stale or altered upstream output could otherwise be treated as reviewed evidence
residual_risks.mitigation: Verify the sealed source snapshot against the inventory, re-hash every phase-one output, and fail promotion or packaging on any source-ledger, path, size, byte-hash or package-hash drift

residual_risks.risk: Evidence, identity records, authoritative sources or templates can expire after packaging but before professional approval
residual_risks.mitigation: Bind the earliest inclusive deadline into every review artifact, re-derive it from persisted facts at Apply, and reject approval after that date without writing final outputs

residual_risks.risk: Private run metadata contains absolute local paths to source, evidence and template files
residual_risks.mitigation: Keep run intake and case artifacts owner-only, expose only pseudonymous relative review references, and use absolute paths solely for local byte verification

commercialista_notice.message_it: La preparazione tecnica dei documenti resta locale. Per predisporre identità, incarico, privacy e AML, Codex esamina i dati strutturati e le evidenze pertinenti del cliente; il fascicolo completo non viene incluso automaticamente.
commercialista_notice.message_en: Technical document preparation remains local. To prepare identity, engagement, privacy and AML review, Codex examines the client's structured facts and relevant evidence; the complete file is not included automatically.
commercialista_notice.message_fr: La préparation technique des documents reste locale. Pour préparer la revue de l’identité, de la mission, de la confidentialité et de la LCB-FT, Codex examine les faits structurés et les preuves pertinentes du client ; le dossier complet n’est pas inclus automatiquement.
commercialista_notice.message_de: Die technische Dokumentvorbereitung bleibt lokal. Für die Prüfung von Identität, Auftrag, Datenschutz und AML untersucht Codex die strukturierten Mandantenangaben und die relevanten Nachweise; die vollständige Akte wird nicht automatisch einbezogen.

limitations: The exact personal data needed depends on the relationship and professional decisions under review; the recorded authority must match the actual runtime and transfer posture
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
